programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando los miembros de un Equipo de Entrenamiento de Capacidades de Acción Regional (REACT) del NCIS mueren durante una explosión, la agente especial del NCIS Jessica Knight, ayuda a resolver el caso utilizando una armadura de alta tecnología.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras siguen a un traficante de armas, el equipo se sorprende cuando Bishop se ve implicado en una antigua filtración de la NSA.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo del NCIS busca a Gibbs después de aparecer los restos de su barco, descubren que estaba rastreando a un asesino en serie con la periodista Marcie Warren (Pam Dawber), que escribió una denuncia sobre él.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras trata de encontrar al asesino en serie que buscaba Gibbs, el equipo de NCIS descubre que otra persona también ha estado rastreando el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny investiga un caso que involucra a una mujer que le disparó a su marido cuando estuvo borracha. Los instintos de Danny le dicen que hay más detrás de la historia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York experiencia un gran apagón, los policías se esfuerzan a contener el caos. Frank después descubre algunas verdades desagradables sobre su departamento.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan un intento de asesinato contra un famoso médico de fertilidad. Eddie es llamado para intervenir en un asunto familiar de los Reagan que involucra a los hijos de Danny.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Eddie y su nueva pareja, Maya, se enfrentan con Jamie en el trabajo cuando no intervienen en una disputa pública en una tienda de conveniencia.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a San Francisco cuando una serie de asesinatos lleva a creer que El asesino del Zodíaco podría haber regresado. Mientras tanto, Reid reflexiona si podría hacer algo más con sus habilidades de genio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo es llamado para buscar a un violador en serie de Houston conocido como El pianista, que ha vuelto y está atacando a sus víctimas anteriores. Por otra parte, Prentiss comienza un tratamiento por la experiencia traumática causada por Ian Doyle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teen holding a beer walks up to a Deputy. A jet skier violates a no wake zone. Deputies cut a tangled bird free. A minor discards his can of alcohol and tells Deputies his mom will pay his citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver believes Officers 'cheated' by using Stop Sticks to end a pursuit. A man making threats at a gas station is caught with his pants down. A suspect caught with meth claims he is a video judge.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic accident where a man ran his truck through a wall. An undercover officer poses as a “john” hoping to attract unsuspecting prostitutes. A vehicle is stopped due to a missing license plate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue an erratic man on a public an armed dispute quickly spoils a birthday celebration and deputies help break up a volatile domestic situation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pursuit ends with the suspect on a roof, a driver calls deputies when a pedestrian loses his cool, and a relationship is jeopardized when a man results to illegal habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect questions whether Officers are 'the real police'. A fleeing suspect parks at an elementary school and makes excuses. A husband's 'final answer' sends his wife to jail for meth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle tries to force an off-duty deputy off of the road. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call involving a woman and her husband's potential lover. A hostile man is out-of-control at a local residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer chases down a woman escaping on her bike, a stolen car leads to a couple revealing their affairs, and a driver with some odd drinking habits is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man about to go on trial for arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building, killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a single human bone is discovered in the desert, Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of the skeleton.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro equipo forense vuelve a estar unido, con Grissom y Catherine liderando tres fantásticos misterios forenses.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una estrella de cine es encontrada muerta en su habitación de hotel después de una fiesta, mientras que un taxista muerto lleva al equipo a una serie de muertes que involucran a trabajadores inmigrantes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro grupo de investigación de crímenes intenta determinar si hubo juego sucio en la caída de un ama de casa por las escaleras.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un robo en medio de la noche, en una casa suburbana al borde del desierto de Las Vegas, revela un vertedero de cadáveres.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate developer is killed, Horatio and the CSI team suspect his wife and her two secret twin sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio suspects that the County Supervisor and the owners of a nearby Native American Casino may be involved when a murder victim is found scalped.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate a movie star's death while he was in a celebrity rehab center and on the verge of exposing some damaging secrets.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A nasty divorce gets even worse when the husband's mistress turns up dead and, as the body count increases, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio investigates a case of revenge on a scorned ex-lover. A CSI's personal problems taint the investigation and Horatio is forced to fire them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a suspected carjacker is murdered, the CSIs learn that the victim may have been involved in drug smuggling off the shores of Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer suspected of killing young women and branding them with a 'Y' is caught and also identified as having the extra Y chromosome.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a probation officer, and Horatio learns that one of the suspects in the murder may be a son he didn’t know he had.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the apparent murder of a college girl, while Delko has mysterious sightings of the late Tim Speedle.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After the Internet turns a high school girl into an international sex symbol, information leaked about Horatio puts his life in danger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team exhaustively search for Horatio’s son after he goes missing during a surprising and deadly prison break.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a sports legend is murdered, the investigation hits a snag when the lab loses the body. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Bizarre occurrences begin to plague the CSIs as they hunt down a serial killer who struck during a total eclipse of the sun.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a model is electrocuted on the runway, the case leads Horatio and the CSI team back to Horatio’s son and his nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Secuestran a una niña y el único testigo que tiene el equipo de CSI es un hombre ciego que oyó el secuestro, lo que lleva a Horatio a un viejo archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el asesino de la esposa de Horatio se fuga de la cárcel y causa disturbios, deben determinar qué es lo que busca y encontrarlo antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una estrella de telerrealidad, el equipo de CSI investiga al elenco, a los admiradores obsesionados y el pasado oculto de las estrellas para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre afirma haber soñado con un asesinato antes de que sucediera, Horatio debe enviar a Natalia de incógnito para que el equipo determine la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando explota una refinería de azúcar, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI hacen un descubrimiento impactante sobre uno de los empleados de la fábrica.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un pescador escapa por poco de la muerte, el equipo de CSI tiene que esquivar las balas para mantenerlo con vida y descubrir quién lo persigue.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer embarazada es agredida, Horatio y el equipo luchan por ella y la vida de su bebé mientras rastrean a su atacante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la investigación de un millonario muerto lleva al equipo de CSI a un servicio de citas de elite, Ryan se hace pasar por un empresario para exponer las mentiras del casamentero.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el agua de una boca de incendios se lleva toda la evidencia de la escena del crimen, el equipo de CSI debe recrear un doble asesinato muy extraño.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en un partido de roller derby, lo único más corto que las faldas de las chicas es su paciencia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Miami arde en crímenes y caos cuando Memmo Fiero, el asesino de la esposa de Horatio Caine, regresa para tomar el control de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI tratan de descubrir cuál de los nerdos se vengó cuando un bravucón de la escuela secundaria murió apedreado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer escapa por poco de la muerte a manos de un asesino en serie, Horatio hará cualquier cosa para rastrear al psicópata.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren un club de caza exclusivo donde la presa es humana, el juego más peligroso de todos.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigation of a suburban kid found beaten to death in Van Cortland Park leads the CSI team to Tanglewood, home to a group of wannabe gangsters.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover the body of a teenaged boy crammed into a 2’ x 2’ x 2’ box buried in the sand at Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Danny Messer find themselves on the trail of an elusive killer when an expectant bride drops dead on her wedding day.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating a truck-jacking, Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover a body pancaked underneath ten tons of steel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When young gang members murder the owner of an upscale Bronx wine store, the CSIs must work to find evidence that ties someone to the crime.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A celebration for the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown high rise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the dirty sheets at an industrial laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An armed suspect is uncovered at a secured crime scene. The routine investigation becomes a foot pursuit through the subway tunnels of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s summer in the city as Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber attempting to scale the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Danny investigate why a young, beautiful, and blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop. Did cuddle parties have anything to do with it?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny, and new CSI Lindsay Hamilton look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de un novio en el día de su boda y la aparición de una caja misteriosa en el capó del auto de Stella.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Mac viaja a Chicago para resolver el misterio de la persona que telefonea como 333 mientras el resto del equipo de CSI trabaja en un asesinato en un vagón de metro.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un hombre rico en un club nocturno de moda y el disparo involuntario de un niño durante un robo.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato del dueño de un hotel de lujo y la muerte de un adolescente que parece estar relacionado con Peter Pan.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Después de que una joven y un juez importante son asesinados, el equipo de CSI trabaja para descubrir la conexión entre los dos crímenes.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un piloto de trineo de asfalto y el misterioso ahogamiento de una mujer en un baño auto desinfectable de pago.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Cuando una asesina entrenada llega a la ciudad de Nueva York, realmente pone a prueba las habilidades de los miembros del equipo de CSI de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El secuestro de una niña y el incendio de su edificio de apartamentos deja a Stella, miembro del equipo de CSI de Nueva York, sintiéndose culpable y sin hogar.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Un tiburón llega a la orilla descargando un cadáver y una extraña escena del crimen que deja al equipo de CSI de Nueva York más que desconcertado.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El asesinato del consejero escolar interrumpe un baile de la escuela secundaria. Mientras tanto, el asesino en serie de taxistas sigue suelto.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Un partido de básquetbol profesional termina temprano, después de que eligen a un fan para el tiro de media cancha de un millón de dólares, él acierta y muere de manera inoportuna.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El asesino de taxistas que el equipo de CSI de Nueva York ha estado tratando de atrapar ataca nuevamente, solo que esta vez es a costa de un policía de Nueva Jersey.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Un robo a un banco hace que Mac investigue el crimen desde dentro para ayudar al ladrón a demostrar que no mató a uno de los rehenes.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Veritas (S5 Ep1)
programme.desc: La saga del robo a un banco de la temporada pasada continúa mientras Mac busca venganza después de que Joe casi lo asesina.

programme.desc: Pursuit suspect crashes on 5 Freeway in Elysian Park.

programme.title: Car Chase

programme.title: Tin Tan y las modelos

programme.title: Rebelde sin casa

programme.title: Aquí Está Tu Enamorado
programme.desc: Antonio es un apuesto "Don Juan" al que le encantan las mujeres, pero huye del matrimonio como del diablo. Todo se complicará cuando pretende a la novia del comisiario y la llegada de un "paquete" misterioso.

programme.title: La marquesa del barrio
programme.desc: Una cantante alcohólica no es sincera con su hija sobre su situación económica y puede ser descubierta con la llegada de su hija de Argentina.

programme.title: La celda olvidada

programme.title: Las coronelas
programme.desc: Un general obsesionado con su huella en la historia va de pueblo en pueblo exigiendo el pago de sus servicios. Un hombre no puede pagarle y ofrece a sus dos hijos a cambio. Pero, peripecias aguardan, ya que los dos bebés varones son en realidad niñas.

programme.title: Atrápame si puedes

programme.title: 12 horas

programme.title: Sangre, sudor y gloria

programme.title: Gladiador

programme.title: Rescatando al soldado Ryan
programme.desc: ¿Por qué están ocho hombres arriesgando sus vidas para salvar solo una? Rodeados de las brutales realidades de la guerra, cada hombre busca su propia respuesta, y la fuerza para triunfar sobre un futuro incierto con honor, decencia y valentía.

programme.title: Transpecos (LAS)

programme.title: Las horas
programme.desc: Tres mujeres en diferentes épocas que se relacionan por un paralelismo en sus vidas personales. Una organiza una fiesta para un amigo con SIDA. Otra, en 1949, sufre como esposa joven. La última, Virginia Woolf, cuando escribe "La señora Dalloway".

programme.title: Desde mi cielo

programme.title: Tirador
programme.desc: Decidido a probar su inocencia en una traición, Bob Lee Swagger se encuentra ahora en una tensa carrera contra todas las fuerzas de la ley de los Estados Unidos y contra una organización oscura que quiere verlo muerto.

programme.title: Peligro en la montaña
programme.desc: Jason Momoa protagoniza este intenso thriller de acción sobre un leñador que lucha por sobrevivir contra los traficantes de drogas que han escondido heroína en su cabaña de caza.

programme.title: Colateral: Lugar y tiempo equivocado
programme.desc: Vincent es un asesino a sueldo tranquilo y calculador que está en su mejor momento. Max es un taxista con grandes sueños y sin resultados. Esta noche, Max llevará a Vincent a su próximo trabajo. Una noche, cinco paradas, cinco asesinatos y un escape.

programme.title: La cacería

programme.title: 13 ASESINOS

programme.title: Actos de venganza

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico sólo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narco.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza

programme.title: Tortugas Ninja 2: fuera de las sombras

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: El núcleo
programme.desc: La Tierra deja de rotar por un cambio en la temperatura del centro del planeta. Para solucionarlo, los astronautas deberán viajar al centro, y detonar una bomba nuclear antes de que el centro se sobrecaliente y destruya toda la vida en la superficie.

programme.title: Golpe bajo: El juego final
programme.desc: La historia de un mariscal de campo profesional, ex campeón universitario, y entrenador, a quien se le pide reunir un equipo de fútbol americano de presos para enfrentar a los guardias mientras se encuentran en prisión.

programme.title: El matador
programme.desc: Un asesino a sueldo que recorre el mundo entabla una inesperada amistad con un vendedor tras encontrarse en un bar de hotel en la Ciudad de México.

programme.title: Resaca mortal
programme.desc: Después de celebrar la boda de Doug en un hotel en Laughlin, Nevada, los chicos con resaca Bradley, Ed y Zach se despiertan en una distopía futurista, al haber perdido a su amigo, Doug.

programme.title: SUNDOWN
programme.desc: En esta comedia hilarante y llena de acción, los mejores amigos Logan y Blake viajan a la destinación exótica de Puerto Vallarta para las vacaciones de primavera. Allí van a encontrar un paraíso de tequila con grandes problemas.

programme.title: Bio-domo
programme.desc: En esta escandalosa comedia, cinco científicos valientes se ven obligados a enfrentarse a formas de vida más aterradoras y molestas que nunca. Con Pauly Shore y Stephen Baldwin.

programme.title: El alucinante viaje de Bill y Ted
programme.desc: Un tirano del futuro crea los dobles malvados de Bill y Ted, a quienes enviará de nuevo para eliminar a los originales.

programme.title: Deslizando a la gloria

programme.title: The Crime of Father Amaro
programme.desc: Politics and sexual passions threaten to corrupt a young, newly-ordained priest in a small Mexican town.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: El robo del siglo

programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pensamientos privados
programme.desc: Cuando los bomberos encontraron a una familia entera muerta dentro de su casa, parecía un asesinato-suicidio, pero había varias pistas inconsistentes entre los escombros.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Darrell North, un gerente de construcción, fue encontrado muerto en su tráiler del trabajo en Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1971, John List dejó una nota con los cuerpos de su madre, esposa y tres hijos en el salón de baile de su mansión antes de desaparecer por completo. Los detectives deben resolver el caso, a pesar de tener solo una fotografía desactualizada de List.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerto al cirujano cardíaco Darryl Sutorius en el sótano de su lujosa casa de Cincinnati, la policía asume que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nicole Rae Walker, de 6 años de edad, murió en un choque donde el culpable se dio a la fuga en su Vecindario de Ft. Lauderdale.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 9 años desaparece, la policía y los voluntarios pasan semanas buscándola.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 11 años desapareció de un pequeño pueblo en un área remota de Alaska, los investigadores se preguntaron si había sido atacada por un oso o se había perdido en los densos bosques.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With 55 high caliber girls making it to finals, it's intimidating for the 30 veterans as they join the audition process & must fight to keep their place. Kitty Carter takes no prisoners as she prepares girls for their solos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp begins with 43 ladies, the pressure starts to build! Kelli's passion is infectious and intimidating in First Meeting, as she sets the expectations very high. Seven girls will be cut to make a squad of 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Fear takes over for the new Training Camp Candidates as they face the reality of doing the DCC kick line & jump splits for the first time. Dreams come true if only temporarily, as the girls try on the uniform for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To be a DCC, you need to look like a DCC. This week Kelli makes sure all the girls have the look. The final rehearsal of the week brings emotions to the forefront as a girl gets sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the candidates enter the sixth week of training camp they need to start looking like a DCC or their spot is in jeopardy. Melissa Rycroft and former DCC Tina Kalina sit in for Judy and give Kelli some fresh eyes.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With three girls left to cut and the first game around the corner, the pressure is intense as the girls return to AT&T Stadium to take the field for the first time since auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final day of training camp has everyone nervous because Kelli and Judy might take a squad of less than 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This season 400 hundred girls that have dared to dream they can become a world-famous Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, put it all on the line, as preliminary auditions for the 2015-2016 season begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As Training Camp starts Kelli lays down the law. Girls start to crack as the reality of how hard it is to become a DCC sets in. Melissa Rycroft offers hope and advice on how to make it through.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy must cut 10 girls to get to the magic number of 36 for the squad. Uniform Fittings gives Kelli a better idea of who has the whole package. As the cuts begin so does emotional end of dreams.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the girls get the DCC look, it helps some and not others. Two surprise guests stop by rehearsal and rock the DCC's world. Kelli has one of the most awkward office visits of all time.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Rocky Mountain National Park rangers question whether a woman's fatal fall was an accident or the result of an act of violence.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman suspects poisoning when she finds her husband of five months dead on the bedroom floor with no clue as to what happened.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A doctor ingests a lethal chemical, causing friends to wonder if it was an attempt at suicide or if he was poisoned -- until a love triangle is uncovered.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An Idaho woman's affair with her married boss leads to a lethal confrontation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a luxury car dealer is found dead, detectives suspect one of his lovers, but lack of evidence stalls the case for a year until one clue breaks it wide open.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man and his son are shot to death, tearing their family apart.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The murder of a California mother beloved by four men reopens a mystery surrounding another young woman's death that occurred decades earlier.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Rocky Mountain National Park rangers question whether a woman's fatal fall was an accident or the result of an act of violence.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman suspects poisoning when she finds her husband of five months dead on the bedroom floor with no clue as to what happened.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The brutal murder of Michelle Young, who was pregnant with her second child when she was killed while her husband was away on business.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police suspect a woman's estranged husband in her stabbing death, but surveillance video shows he was not at the scene.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When film executive Gavin Smith vanishes, Los Angeles detectives search for clues amid reported sightings and suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the disappearance of a Marine's 19-year-old wife reveals a secret love triangle and multiple suspects.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Final Adios
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final 2 men to pack their bags because they're goin' to Playa Car, Mexico for an exotic getaway!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Fifteen Beds and a Bucket of Puke
programme.desc: Flavor Flav welcomes 20 women to his macadocious mansion with the hope of finding the next great love of his life.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Rub a Dub Flav
programme.desc: Flavor Flav challenges his remaining fifteen Flavorettes to a never before attempted hot tub speed dating competition.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Friend of Flav's is a Friend of Mine
programme.desc: Ten girls are left and the competition is getting stiff. Flav divides the girls into groups of five and presents them with two challenges.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Flavor of Chicken
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has a special surprise for his eight remaining ladies. His “moms”, Anna Drayton has come to visit.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: What Happens in Flavor Stays in Flavor
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is a good luck person. So he needs a good luck woman. To test the girls on this trait, he flies the seven remaining women to Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: To make Wheels jealous, Stephanie, the school president, appoints Joey as the Sports Rep., even though the post is supposed to be held by a seventh grader. As a result, the seventh grade class wants to impeach her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Spike is confused about whether she should keep her baby and whether she can remain friends with Shane, the baby's father. When her teen-mother counseling group conducts an experiment, Shane begin to realize the responsibilities of parenthood.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Feeling alone and vulnerable because her parents are always working, Lucy is pleased when a substitute teacher takes a special interest in her. However, she soon discovers that his desires go beyond simply wanting to help her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Joey makes an after-school study date with the new girl, Liz, who has a fast reputation. He prepares for the date by buying condoms, but discovers a different person than he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare receives crushing news while waiting for her MRI results. Needing time away from the hospital, Clare convinces Drew to help her escape.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As summer comes to an end, Becky tries to understand the meaning behind an unexpected tragedy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Adam, the Degrassi students try their best to move on but when it's your brother… And fitting in is hard for Zoë because she's never just been a normal girl. Alli reunites with Leo on her home turf.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to concoct any excuse to save her reputation with the magazine but doesn’t want to play the cancer card.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Focusing more on her music than Miles, Maya lets Zoë talk her into making a sexy music video.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles helps Maya discover who is behind her video going viral. Maya's hellbent on revenge, getting her into hot water.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Student council prez Drew is psyched about his Degrassi TV interview but when the story sheds a negative light, Drew’s stunned.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is excited to have Bianca back in town for Thanksgiving but is surprised when she isn't as forthcoming as he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Alli’s birthday, but all she can think about is Leo being sent back to France.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli is still lying to protect Leo, but her stories are beginning to unravel. Maya shows her rubber room classmates that she isn’t a princess.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew attempts juggling his new job and his new girl. To forget about Leo, Alli focusses on her science experiment. After getting thrown out of class for forgetting to wear a bra, Imogen plans a scathing piece for Degrassi TV.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Failing at balancing his life, Drew decides he has to break up with Zoë. Alli partners up with Dallas in an attempt to stay focused on her science experiment. Imogen takes her dress code fight online, but what does she really want to achieve?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A shocking discovery leads Miles to question his family life. Eli is slipping away, and Clare finds herself growing closer to Drew. Dallas wants to be with Alli, but the truth about her relationship with Leo could send him over the edge.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles is determined to out his father’s secrets, but he may not be ready for the whole truth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of `Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur

programme.title: Kill Zone
programme.desc: An inspector and his unit are after a crime boss and are willing to capture him at all costs. The crime boss enlists his top henchmen to end their dirty schemes.

programme.title: Kill Zone 2
programme.desc: When his cover gets blown, a Hong Kong cop (Wu Jing) lands in a Thai prison where the warden works with a criminal mastermind (Louis Koo) to harvest organs.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike is a tough hitman, who makes his hits look like accidents or suicide. He's in a gang of hitmen, each with his own style. When his loved ex is killed, Mike looks for those responsible.

programme.title: Accident Man: Hitman's Holiday
programme.desc: A hit man must beat the top assassins in the world.

programme.title: Martial Law
programme.desc: Sean Thompson and Billie Blake are a part of the L.A.P.D.'s new program called 'Martial Law'. When they begin to tangle with criminal and kung fu master Dalton Rhodes, it becomes personal...

programme.title: Martial Law II: Undercover
programme.desc: Two undercover cops investigating a murder uncover a deadly ring of corruption at a nightclub where the rich are entertained by seductive women and protected by martial arts experts.

programme.title: Bloodfist
programme.desc: Don Wilson plays retired kickboxer Jake Raye, who travels to Manila, where his brother is favored to win a kickboxing competition.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. Rose's disappearance remained a mystery, until a tiny clue is found years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappears from a strip club in East Hartford, CT. Police consider various patrons of the club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of jobs. Forensic investigators had to determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting death of a young escort prompts an investigation into high society in New York, while McCoy and Carmichael track down career criminals.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a corrections officer leads detectives to a women's prison where a guard was linked to an inmate Carmichael put away on drug charges.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives feel a woman is withholding information when they probe the murder of her wealthy husband and very young daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Evidence points Detectives Briscoe and Curtis in the direction of a fascist youth gathering after the brutal beating and murder of a high-school girl.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A shooting sends police divers into the Hudson River where they find a VW bus linked to a murder case closed in the 1960s during student uprisings.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a parolee's corpse in a car trunk sends detectives after a suspect that bounty hunters also want, dead or alive.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis probe the murder of a popular Harlem community leader; McCoy and Carmichael struggle to prevent a chaotic situation.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a corpse in Battery Park reunites squads when the victim turns out to be a Baltimore official. (Concluding on "Homicide: Life on the Street.")

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a girl who managed to die, unnoticed, amid the hustle and bustle of an ER's waiting room.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a possible homicide while probing the assault of a retired divorce attorney.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a police officer who was shot while on an undercover stakeout.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the shooting of an investigative reporter to a sensationalized murder case, closed 20 years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Family secrets unravel when detectives look for motives for a college professor being thrown into the path of a subway train.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a corporate mogul's death, caused by an overdose of a drug that enhances sexual performance.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a promising mathematician who was involved in a turbulent relationship with a college professor.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Sumérgete en la diversión veraniega con Little Angel! Desde compartir en el parque hasta emocionantes visitas al parque acuático, nadar, bailar, acampar, días de playa y aventuras junto al lago, ¡es un verano lleno de alegría y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un día de diversión, aprendizaje y recuerdos inolvidables. Habrá sonrisas, carcajadas y diversión sin fin.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Súbete a bordo de un viaje lleno de diversión y risas mientras Little Angel se adentra en una aventura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en una aventura mágica! Desde momentos tranquilos hasta monos juguetones, cuentos de hadas, búsquedas de huevos de Pascua, parques de diversiones, cumpleaños y paciencia, ¡es un día de maravillas y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un viaje en el que atraviesan situaciones inesperadas con valentía y creatividad, demostrando que incluso los pequeños retos pueden superarse con un poco de ayuda de los amigos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels para un baño de burbujas lleno de diversión, donde hacen de cuenta que bañarse es divertido, pero con burbujas es la bonanza de la diversión.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus aventuras de juego. Desde la imitación hasta los sustos a la hora de dormir, lavarse las manos, la paciencia, la búsqueda de juguetes, las ovejas sucias y el alegre cucú, ¡es un día de risas y juegos!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras! Desde tomar turnos hasta descubrir el cuerpo, las rutinas antes de dormir, superar enfermedades, la seguridad en la nieve y la diversión en Londres, ¡cada momento trae alegría y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas. Con sus amigos y familiares, Mía, de 6 años, experimenta el mundo que la rodea a través de canciones.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en una divertida fiesta familiar, donde se embarcan en una serie de aventuras que celebran las alegrías de la unión y el aprendizaje.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a los Little Angels en un día lleno de aventuras! Desde armar un puesto de limonadas hasta convertirse en princesas, explorar con la araña Itsy Bitsy y disfrutar de fiestas en pijama, ¡cada momento es mágico!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un día lleno de emoción y asombro. Desde aprender el baile de Baby Shark hasta explorar la magia de mezclar colores, jugar y descubrir sorpresas, ¡es un viaje de diversión y descubrimiento que te dejará sonriendo!

programme.desc: Bienvenido al mundo de los pequeños modales, donde los Little Angels enseñarán valiosas lecciones de amabilidad, empatía y buenos modales.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Doc Baker (Kevin Hagen) decides to retire after a patient dies. With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle, Melissa Sue Anderson and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary (Melissa Sue Anderson) is held hostage by the outlaw Jesse James (guest star Dennis Rucker). With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Jonathan Garvey's barn burns down leaving the family with no means of support, but Jonathan is angry when his wife takes a job at the post office.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles take Jonathan's place in a bout with an aging fighter (Moses Gunn), but victory dims when Charles realizes the boxer is badly injured.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary plans to meet a shy suitor at the Mankato Fair, until she encounters his charming balloonist boss.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Adam and Luke Simms move to Walnut Grove; Luke falls in love with Nellie but she has reservations about him.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: An American Indian boy arrives in town seeking medical help for his ailing father. With Michael Landon and Karen Grassle.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura wants to impress a newly discovered old buddy; Charles and Jonathan try to start a freight line, which leads them further away from home.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary takes a teaching job in a backwoods community only to clash with a hostile woman bent on driving her away.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Caroline recalls her first meeting with Charles when he is late for their wedding anniversary celebration.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura finds a bottle bearing a message floating downstream, then another containing an infant's picture.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles helps Mr. Oleson's unloved nephew learn values by hiring him for odd jobs.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: News of Charles' inheritance from a wealthy relative prompts townspeople to suggest uses for the money.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Pregnant Caroline worries Charles will be disappointed if her baby is a girl.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick is in pursuit of finding out how to build a drawbridge. In Spansylvania, they meet a dragon who's in pursuit of them - and along the way they find out that some materials are better suited for bridges than others.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: When Sally destroys Nick's model of a mountain, the Cat takes them to meet Sara of Serendip, an inventor who helps them understand that you can make new discoveries through your mistakes.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Sally loses her slideyness and when they go to the Frictionarium, they find out that there's a force called friction that can stop a person from sliding.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick unintentionally loses Sally's bouncy ball. They go to Ballaballo and learn how different balls are made of different materials that make them bouncier.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are in the treehouse making funny faces at themselves in the mirror when they notice a bird flying back and forth into the tree branches.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick is trying to learn how to ride his bike and in Balencia, he discovers the things to keep in mind when you're trying to maintain your balance.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: When Nick's favourite flyer gets stuck in the tree, Nick wishes he could jump really high and retrieve it, but gravity holds him down.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are frustrated by a puddle that always forms at an inconvenient spot on the sidewalk. They go to a water park and learn that water always seeks the lowest level.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Sally is trying to make a vase for her mother, but each one she tries falls over. Cat takes them to Blueprintia, and they discover what they can learn by designing before building.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Sally is playing a song on an instrument made up of different things in the Treehouse, but she can't find the right note for her song.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Sally keeps getting found when they play Hide and Seek. Cat takes them to Tagaloo to meet a great seeker.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: When Nick's magic trick causes his toy car to disappear under the porch, the Cat takes them to Arcade Island to win a Gasper-ma-clasper.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: The kids are making bubbles and want to save one for Sally's mom. But they always pop. In Odds-n-Endsville they find out that landing bubbles on some surfaces helps the bubbles last longer.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are playing musical instruments and notice that Fish's water is rippling. Why? Cat takes them to the Jingly Jungle for a concert by the great Vibrato.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally's soccer game is obstructed by a large log that they can't lift out of the way.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Sally thinks that the three stick she has aren't enough to make anything.Cat takes them to a place where they can get more sticks.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally wonder if they can walk on a cloud, and the Cat takes them to Mount Knowmore. As they climb up, they discover hard surfaces and watery surfaces and walk through fog.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.desc: Andrew Duggan guest stars as Justin Bainbridge, a multimillionaire paranoid militarist, whose son, Howard, defected behind the Iron Curtain with the formula to a lethal nerve gas he had developed in "A Ghost Story"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A visit with world famous clarinetist, Richard Stoltzman, who makes music playing notes that go up and down. In Make-Believe, there's hope that an elevator operator will solve the up and down problem at Lady Elaine's Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Balloon artist, Bruce Franco, blows up balloons into animal shapes. It takes a lot of practice to be able to make fancy things like that from balloons. Then, Mr. McFeely and Mayor Maggie go up in the air for a hot-air balloon ride.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make stuffed bears. Mr. McFeely encounters someone dressed in a bear costume. Daniel recognizes that the bear is a person in costume and realizes that person is Lady Aberlin.
